articles.title: Scientists say this algae could remove microplastics from drinking water
articles.description: Researchers created a special kind of algae that can grab microscopic plastic pollution out of water almost like a magnet. articles.title: This strange giant dinosaur may change what we know about Jurassic titans
articles.description: A bizarre new giant dinosaur discovered in Argentina is giving paleontologists a fresh look at how Jurassic titans evolved in the Southern Hemisphere.
